creator: bergerkos@yahoo.co.uk
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #3)
I'll say no, not anymore.
I'm not experiencing this issue on my OTHER system upgraded to 13.0-RELEASE-p7 via freebsd-update. And the pkg version of libreoffice now is 7.3.1.3_1, all working fine.

And the system I was reporting the bug for has been upgraded to STABLE, then to BETA3. So it must have been the problem with the system itself...
